description: A perfect blend of comfort and style, the fila Glide flip flop comes with a perforated leather strap and a cushioned footbed, that will never make you want to glide out of them.UpperSynthetic leather straps perforated on the upper and has a fabric inner lining with a toe separator to lock the foot in place and offer abrasion-free comfortCushioned PU footbed perforated and with brand name and logo printed all overOutsoleTPR outsole with foot shape styled lugs for absolute grip and tractionSlipper careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
